query:
INSERT INTO testimonials (name, initial, date, title, text, featured, displayOrder, category) VALUES
('Barbara', 'B', 'August 4, 2025', 'Life is Forever Changed', 'The Work, The Syllabus, The Questions. Jeff has a way about him to cut to the heart of the matter. It\'s not always easy but definitely worth it. Jeff is supportive and expansive. Having awareness is the first step to transformation and with Jeff this becomes the roadmap of your life. A life filled with joy, peace and love in a way that I never had experienced before. I like to call it The Unlearning of Barbara B. I am no longer caught up in my stories of lack. Thanks a million, Jeff!', 0, 1, NULL),
('Veronica', 'V', 'August 8, 2024', 'Learning to see things in a different way', 'Jeff is like a lighthouse. Metaphorically speaking, he has helped me navigate through life\'s challenges and difficult times. Jeff provides a sense of direction, safety, and hope. And just like a lighthouse, Jeff helps me see when I\'m off course. And when I find myself in the middle of the ocean alone and afraid, his light, his smile, his compassion, his patience become the light that helps me find my way during darkness or uncertainty.', 1, 2, 'personal'),
('Rachael', 'R', 'November 27, 2023', 'Empowering Transformation!', 'I started working with Jeff since Feb 2023 and looking back I can not tell you how much I have grown, and finally seeing life for what it is. BEAUTIFUL! Thanks to Jeff i understand that I am not just a mom, a wife, a daughter, and a friend. I am on the path to love myself. I wholeheartedly recommend Jeff to anyone seeking not only a life coach but a genuine partner in their personal development journey.', 0, 3, NULL),
('Tyler', 'T', 'August 22, 2023', 'Everyone needs a Jeff', 'Jeff\'s guidance has saved my life. I was in therapy for 17 years. I struggled with anxiety, depression and addiction. Jeff is not only a safe place for me but someone whose guidance I can trust. I could never imagine my life & headspace where they are today. Everybody needs a Jeff in their life. Thank you universe for allowing our paths to cross!', 1, 4, 'transformation');
